name: Ferryman - ULTRAKILL
description:
The Ferryman from ultrakill! Only having a "spoonful" ;) The art is by @ms8748 on Twitter (Or X)!

Now this is a bot I was very excited to release! I love the Ferryman, he's one of my favorite ultrakill characters! I will most likely go back to making SCPs, but the Ferryman is cool :3 Feedback is appreciated, and I'm pretty new to this so don't expect anything good.

And a final note: You can.
creator: Preparati
